summary: Update mode testing complete - Admin role bug fixes verified. Both bug fixes working correctly: 1) Admins now visible in Edit Employee dropdown (dropdown shows all employees including admins with Admin badge), 2) Admin codes visible in All Employees section ONLY for business owners (Matthew/Eunice). Non-owner admins cannot see admin codes. All login flows tested: owner 4-digit codes (4399, 0826), non-owner admin email+code flow. 7 new tests created, all passing. 14 total frontend tests passed.

admin_visibility_in_edit_dropdown.test: Edit Employee dropdown shows admin users with Admin badge
admin_visibility_in_edit_dropdown.result: PASSED - Admins appear in dropdown with '⭐ Admin' badge

tests: Owner sees admin codes in All Employees list - PASSED
Non-owner admin does NOT see admin codes in All Employees list - PASSED
admin_codes_visible_for_owners_only.result: PASSED - Admin codes only visible when isOwner=true

tests: Owner Matthew can login with 4-digit code 4399 - PASSED
Owner Eunice can login with 4-digit code 0826 - PASSED

non_owner_admin_login_flow.test: Non-owner admin login requires email first, then code - PASSED

context_for_next_testing_agent: Two admin role bug fixes verified: 1) Edit Employee dropdown now shows all employees including admins (removed the filter that was hiding them), 2) Admin codes are displayed in AllEmployeesSection only when isOwner prop is true. New test file admin-role-bugfixes.spec.ts covers both fixes comprehensively.
